vectors.name: open-hello
vectors.notes: Minimal open-mode vector. Anyone with the spec can read it.

vectors.name: stealth-hello
vectors.notes: Smallest stealth-mode vector. Padding fills the rest of the LSB capacity.

vectors.name: stealth-long-message
vectors.notes: Longer message; same wire format, same fixed carrier size.
vectors.plaintext_utf8: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

vectors.name: stealth-with-transparent-border
vectors.notes: Verifies that the decoder ignores alpha < 255 pixels.
vectors.plaintext_utf8: edge pixels are transparent and must be skipped
